title: lepisanthes hirtella
intro: Lepisanthes hirtella is a species of plant in the family Salicaceae, commonly known as the hairy silver apple or hairy lepisanthus. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lepisanthes hirtella are attributed to its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Lepisanthes hirtella is prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
